summary: Complete testing of OTP-gated booking request flow for BookMyVenue. All 14 features tested successfully - backend APIs (11/11 tests passed), frontend UI flows (landing page, venue detail, enquiry form with OTP verification), and admin dashboard verification.

issues: DialogTitle accessibility warning in console - should wrap with VisuallyHidden component for screen readers

critical_code_review_comments: EnquiryForm.js: Consider adding DialogTitle with VisuallyHidden for accessibility compliance
seed_data_creation: Multiple test booking requests created via API and frontend flows (BMV-MUM-000004, BMV-HYD-000001, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: OTP-gated booking flow is fully functional. OTP is logged to console (debug_otp) since no SMS gateway is configured. Key test-ids: enquire-now-btn, otp-input, otp-verify-btn, submit-enquiry-btn, booking-ref-id. Backend endpoints: /api/otp/send, /api/otp/verify, /api/booking-requests

backend_api_tests.GET /api/venues/cities: PASS - Returns list of cities with venue_count
backend_api_tests.Booking ID city codes: PASS - DEL, MUM, BLR, HYD codes correct

frontend_tests.Landing page loads: PASS - Hero section with city dropdown visible
frontend_tests.Venue detail page loads: PASS - Test Banquet Hall with pricing and availability
frontend_tests.EnquiryForm Step 1 (Personal Details): PASS - Name, phone, email fields work
frontend_tests.EnquiryForm Step 2 (OTP): PASS - OTP sent, debug_otp logged to console
frontend_tests.OTP verification: PASS - Verify button accepts correct OTP
frontend_tests.EnquiryForm Step 3 (Event Details): PASS - Event type, guest count, date selectors work
frontend_tests.Confirmation screen: PASS - Shows booking ref, assigned RM, callback time

booking_ids_created: BMV-MUM-000004 (Final Test User - wedding in Mumbai)

features_verified: Landing page hero: 'Explore Venues' CTA navigates to /venues with city query param when city selected
Backend API: GET /api/venues/cities returns list of cities with venue counts
Backend API: GET /api/venues?city=Mumbai returns venues for Mumbai
Venue detail page loads with real data from API
Clicking 'Speak to Our Venue Expert' on venue detail page opens EnquiryForm dialog
EnquiryForm Step 1: Fill name, phone, email → click Continue
EnquiryForm Step 2 (OTP): OTP is sent to phone, verify OTP
Backend API: POST /api/otp/send with phone number returns success and debug_otp
Backend API: POST /api/otp/verify with phone and correct OTP returns verified=true
After OTP verified, form advances to Step 3 (Event Details)
Fill event type, guest count, date → Continue to Step 4 (Investment)
Submit booking request → shows confirmation with BMV-format booking ID
Backend API: POST /api/booking-requests creates lead with booking_id format BMV-XXX-XXXXXX
Admin login and verify new booking request visible in admin dashboard leads list

notes.otp_gateway: OTP is NOT actually sent via SMS - debug_otp is returned in API response for testing. Frontend logs OTP to console.
